description_long: This is a rectangular desk with a light gray, smooth tabletop and a sturdy blue metal frame. The desk features a modesty panel on the rear side, which adds structural support and privacy for the user. The tabletop has rounded corners and a light wood trim, giving it a modern and functional appearance. The legs are cantilevered, made of blue-painted metal, and are designed to provide ample legroom underneath. The desk does not have any drawers or additional storage components attached. Its design is practical and robust, suitable for high-traffic environments.
description: A rectangular desk with a light gray top, blue metal frame, and modesty panel, designed for durability and functionality.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open leg space and cantilevered blue metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the thickness of the tabletop.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the blue modesty panel and full frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same slim profile and leg design as the other side.
attribute_orientation: The side with the open leg space and no modesty panel is intended to face the user, while the side with the blue modesty panel is the back.
